name: studio.delete_blog_category
description: Delete a blog category from an Actium Studio site. Posts assigned to this category are unassigned but not deleted.
whenToUse: Taxonomy cleanup: remove an obsolete category after consolidating posts onto a surviving one.
Operator detected a typo in a category slug and created a replacement; old one must be removed.
Merge flow: pair with 'reassign_to' to bulk-move posts before the delete takes effect.
whenNotToUse: Category still has posts and caller did not supply reassign_to — without reassignment, posts become uncategorized; confirm the intent first.
Caller wants to unassign a category from one post — that's an update_post operation; this deletes the category entry itself.
Caller wants to delete a tag — use studio.delete_blog_tag; category and tag endpoints are separate.
